items.title: GTA 6's Lack of a PC Port Isn't Out of Greed, According to a Former Rockstar Producer
items.summary: A former Rockstar Games producer has explained why the developer's PC versions usually come long after the console version.

items.title: Ahead of GTA 6, GTA Online players complain that Rockstar "nerfed literally everything" commonly used to make money
items.summary: Hundreds of thousands have been knocked the heists

items.title: GTA 6 isn't on PC at launch because it's 'always better to start with the constraints', suggests former Rockstar producer
items.summary: "It's not that we don't care about PC."
